# Joey Zhao

> Personal portfolio and independent writing by Joey Zhao, a senior product designer in Shanghai focused on AI products, B2B SaaS, complex systems, and growth design.

Canonical site: https://joeyzhao.cc/

## Writing

- Chinese Writing hub: https://joeyzhao.cc/writing/
- English Writing hub: https://joeyzhao.cc/en/writing/
- AI product design: https://joeyzhao.cc/en/writing/ai-designers-cannot-only-sell-screens
- McDonald's seating and business trade-offs: https://joeyzhao.cc/en/writing/mcdonalds-seating-business-tradeoffs
- Building Finfold, an AI content-growth workspace: https://joeyzhao.cc/en/writing/finfold-one-brief-eleven-platforms
- Elevator mirrors and inclusive design: https://joeyzhao.cc/en/writing/elevator-mirrors-four-problems
- Portfolios as evidence of design judgment: https://joeyzhao.cc/en/writing/portfolio-as-evidence

## Selected work

- Signals Notebook, enterprise lineage visualization: https://joeyzhao.cc/signals
- CollovGPT, AI interior design: https://joeyzhao.cc/collov

- Ctrip Hotel, video cover conversion: https://joeyzhao.cc/ctrip

- WeNeed, short-video gifting community: https://joeyzhao.cc/weneed
- Pleasure Contract, AI-assisted card roguelike: https://joeyzhao.cc/pleasurecontract
